evidently.project.datadeliveryobject.Cfn: A structure that contains information about where Evidently is to store evaluation events for longer term storage.

evidently.project.datadeliveryobject.Log.Description: If the project stores evaluation events in CloudWatch Logs, this structure stores the log group name.

evidently.project.datadeliveryobject.S3.Description: If the project stores evaluation events in an Amazon S3 bucket, this structure stores the bucket name and bucket prefix.
